name: ""
description: "Standard pull request"
---

## Summary

*What does this PR change and why?*

## Lineage

*Does this PR touch any identity modules (`docs/`, `agents/`)?*  
*If yes, attach a lineage delta file at `docs/deltas/YYYY-MM-DD_delta_<slug>.md`.*

- [ ] No identity modules touched — no delta required.
- [ ] Identity modules touched — delta file attached: `docs/deltas/___`

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are minimal and reversible.
- [ ] A rollback path is documented (in the delta or in this PR body).
- [ ] At least one human reviewer assigned.
